properties.titulo_evento: Doodle Labs eyes US, European production sites as demand soars for jam-resistant drones
properties.descricao: Doodle Labs hopes to turn its success in equipping jam-hardened drones in Ukraine into additional production sites in Europe and he United States.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel’s IAI unveils ‘Hypnosis’ system for confusing enemy drone swarms
properties.descricao: The system, called Hypnosis, consists of an array of mobile “stations” around a defended area that send out jamming signals against drone swarms.

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli air strike injures 14 in Gaza City
properties.descricao: An Israeli air strike on Gaza City injured at least 14 people, according to Gaza health officials.

properties.titulo_evento: Lebanon’s military starts ‘pilot zone’ takeover in south
properties.descricao: Implementation of the trilateral framework agreement between Israel, Lebanon and the US is to start in three villages.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran says diplomatic efforts ongoing via mediators amid fighting with US
properties.descricao: An Iranian army spokesman asserts the war will continue until deterrence against further attacks has been achieved.

properties.titulo_evento: China, immigration, drugs: Behind US policy in Latin America
properties.descricao: Latin America analyst Brian Winter argues that Trump sees Venezuela as a foreign policy success… and Cuba may be next.

properties.titulo_evento: What are ‘civilian’ sites in international law and where have US, Iran hit?
properties.descricao: The US has escalated attacks on Iranian roads, bridges and power plants, and Iran too, has responded.

properties.titulo_evento: What we know about US soldiers killed in Iran war, and Iranian casualties
properties.descricao: Trump has expressed sadness and vowed to hit Iran 'very hard' to honour killed US soldiers.

properties.titulo_evento: Petro to give farewell speech amid Colombia transfer-of-power tensions
properties.descricao: The outgoing president has called for protests as he continues to dispute the results of last month's election.

properties.titulo_evento: Since Islamabad MoU: What’s changed for the US, Iran and the Gulf?
properties.descricao: We explain how the war has changed for all the parties since their MoU unravelled and as the conflict has escalated.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian strike on ship near Odesa kills 10, Ukraine hits Moscow with drones
properties.descricao: Ukraine launches hundreds of drones towards Moscow a day after Russia unleashed a massive barrage of ballistic missiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
properties.descricao: Iran responded with attacks in Syria and Jordan, as two ships reportedly exploded in the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
properties.descricao: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.

properties.titulo_evento: Ryanair profits drop as Iran war puts off passengers and lifts fuel costs
properties.descricao: The Irish airline said oil prices had increased costs meanwhile Brent crude surpassed $90.

properties.titulo_evento: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
properties.descricao: Wang Jibing is among blue-collar Chinese workers gaining wider attention for their literary works.

properties.titulo_evento: Tate brothers arrested in US as further UK charges take total to 59
properties.descricao: The Crown Prosecution Service says it has requested their extradition from the US, while their lawyer says they are innocent.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
properties.descricao: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

properties.titulo_evento: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US
properties.descricao: He was arrested in 2021 during Cuba's largest anti-government protests in decades and spent five years ⁠in prison.

properties.titulo_evento: Yemen’s Houthis threaten Bab el-Mandeb closure in embargo on Saudi Arabia
properties.descricao: The Iran-backed Houthis declared a maritime embargo on Saudi Arabia after accusing the kingdom of attacking Sana'a airport and maintaining a years-long blockade, putting one of the world's busiest shipping lanes at risk.

properties.titulo_evento: IRGC pledges 'unforgettable lesson' for US as Iran signals return to talks
properties.descricao: The Revolutionary Guard told Ayatollah Khamenei it regarded his message as "a binding command," as Iran's foreign ministry said diplomacy remained open and mediators sought a 10-day ceasefire to revive the framework deal.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine fires 400 drones at Moscow as Russia steps up ballistic missile attacks
properties.descricao: Ukraine's latest attack follows a weekend of escalating exchanges between the two sides, with Russia targeting Kyiv with ballistic missiles on Sunday and Ukraine hitting warehouses outside of Moscow on Saturday.

properties.titulo_evento: Chaos erupts in Buenos Aires after Argentina's World Cup final defeat
properties.descricao: Riot police use water cannon in Buenos Aires after Argentina's World Cup final defeat to Spain, as protests break out in the capital.

properties.titulo_evento: US hits Iran for ninth night as Khamenei calls ceasefire 'worthless'
properties.descricao: US Central Command said it targeted military command centres, air defence systems and missile sites overnight, as Iran's ayatollah called Trump's signature on the interim deal "worthless and invalid" and a negotiator said Tehran was suspending its co...

properties.titulo_evento: Trump and Sánchez meet at World Cup final after nearly two years of diplomatic tensions
properties.descricao: For nearly two years, the leaders of Spain and the United States have clashed over issues ranging from defence spending to US policy in the Middle East.

properties.titulo_evento: Rodri reveals the secret behind Spain's run to the World Cup final
properties.descricao: Spain's captain says La Roja owe their success to the bond between coach De la Fuente and the squad, and warns Argentina are 'the team to beat', 'much more than Messi'.

properties.titulo_evento: Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami as UK seeks extradition
properties.descricao: Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate have been arrested in Miami ahead of an extradition request from the United Kingdom. British authorities accuse them of serious offences, including rape, human trafficking and sexual exploitation.

properties.titulo_evento: Fears over Gulf shipping and water rise as US-Iran trade strikes
properties.descricao: The United States and Iran have continued to exchange fire on July 20th, raising fears for Gulf shipping and water supplies in the region. After Kuwait reported Iranian attacks on water and electricity plants as well as oil facilities over the weeke...

properties.descricao: Eve Irvine is pleased to welcome Robbie Knock, Lead Commentator and sports journalist. The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be remembered not only for Spain's triumph on the pitch but also for the way football became enmeshed in politics, entertainment, ins...

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine fires 400 missiles at Moscow after deadly Russian attacks
properties.descricao: Ukraine fired more than 400 drones toward Moscow in its latest major attack on the Russian capital on July 20. The blitz came hours after Russia bombarded Kyiv and other Ukrainian cities with ballistic missiles in a relentless cycle of tit-for-tat s...

properties.titulo_evento: Burnham Advocates Closer EU Relationship: Big Gains Will Only Come from Rejoining the Single Market

properties.titulo_evento: Residents evacuated as the south of France burns
properties.descricao: Fast-moving wildfires in the southern French region of the Var have pushed many people from their homes. Over 600 firefighters have been used to try contain the blaze. It comes as temperatures surge past 40 degrees celsius, with an orange heatwave a...

properties.titulo_evento: 'We gave it everything': Fans react to World Cup final game
properties.descricao:
From Madrid to Barcelona, Spanish fans were out in full force to celebrate their team's win.
 
It took 11 shots to get them the 1-0 victory over Argentina.
 
Meanwhile, in Buenos Aires, fans still celebrated late into the night, despite coming in se...

properties.titulo_evento: As UK's Keir Starmer says farewell, his successor faces a 'colossal task'
properties.descricao: UK PM Keir Starmer is resigning on July 20, with new Labour leader Andy Burnham set to take on UK premiership. But where will Burnham take the country once he is in power? While he has signaled he would focus on social issues, he has faced criticism...

properties.titulo_evento: Russia says bus strike kills 5 in border region with Ukraine
properties.descricao: The strike comes as Ukraine launched more than hundreds of drones at Moscow after a Russian missile barrage on Kyiv, as President Zelenskyy sought to calm growing tensions over Ukraine’s military leadership.

properties.titulo_evento: Why a 90-year-old treaty limits NATO in the Black Sea
properties.descricao: A 90-year-old treaty still shapes the balance of power in the Black Sea. As Ukraine fights on against Russia, can NATO project power into waters it can't enter freely?

properties.titulo_evento: Spain won the World Cup, but Donald Trump 'cast a shadow'
properties.descricao: Though Donald Trump mostly stayed clear of stadiums, the World Cup may influence the US midterm elections. DW looks at the political implications of "the most successful sporting event maybe in the history of the world."

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US conducts strikes for 9th night in a row
properties.descricao: The US launched another wave of attacks against Iran, this time reportedly hitting targets in the northwestern city of Tabriz and elsewhere. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: New Bundesliga TV deal in US prioritizes reach over money
properties.descricao: The Bundesliga has a new home on American screens after Germany's top football league left ESPN. The new deal is a sign of the times.

properties.titulo_evento: Algeria seeks larger EU energy role amid regional tensions
properties.descricao: Algeria and Germany agreed to deepen energy ties during President Abdelmadjid Tebboune's recent visit to Berlin. But Algiers is still grappling with tensions at home, over Western Sahara and instability in the Sahel.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia's largest ballistic assault of war rocks Kyiv
properties.descricao: Fires broke out across the Ukrainian capital after Russia's latest missile attack, which used the highest number of ballistic missiles of the war so far. Several people have been injured in Kyiv.
